meaning: n.平民,自费学生,有共用权者
examples: In 1959, Akihito broke with imperial tradition by marrying a commoner.
He would take the name of a commoner.
He was born a commoner, albeit into a wealthy Transylvanian family.
Divorce, four times commoner than it was 30 years ago, ends almost half of marriages.
Born a commoner, she won the affection of King Louis XV in 1745, becoming his chief mistress and gaining nobility.
